audit_items.proof_trace: Logic inverted: function returns early when blobsCount > 0 (line 58), preventing RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE error. When a block has blobs but node is missing custody columns, it yields partial sidecars instead of throwing error, violating all-or-nothing requirement.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker requests data columns by range. Node missing some custody columns for a blob-containing block returns partial response instead of RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE, violating consistency and breaking data availability assumptions.
